changeSet.author: Kinser
changeSet.comment: Merge js_param_converter + template_param_converter into param_converter_script, and js_response_converter + template_response_converter into response_converter_script

changeSet.author: Kinser

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM m_dictionary WHERE code = 'ConverterType' AND JSON_SEARCH(items, 'one', 'JAVA', NULL, '$[*].value') IS NULL

changeSet.comment: Add JAVA converter type to ConverterType dictionary
changeSet.sql: UPDATE m_dictionary SET items = JSON_ARRAY_INSERT( items, '$[2]', JSON_OBJECT( 'order', 0, 'value', 'JAVA', 'defaultItem', false, 'description', JSON_OBJECT('languages', JSON_OBJECT('en-US', 'Java', 'zh-CN', NULL)), 'showContext', JSON_OBJECT('languages', JSON_OBJECT('en-US', 'Java', 'zh-CN', 'java')) ) ) WHERE code = 'ConverterType';
